allotment.cmNoticeBody: If the agency is connected to your Channel Manager (Exely / HotelRunner), bookings arrive in the PMS automatically — no manual entry needed. If the agency is outside your CM (direct allotment contract), enter sales as manual bookings. These contracts do NOT push automatic availability blocks to your CM; allotment is for internal tracking + reporting.
allotment.cmNoticeMatchHint: Match rule: For a booking to count against this contract, room type + date range must overlap AND one of the booking's agency/channel fields (agency_name, channel, ota_channel) must contain the "Tour Operator" name you enter here (case-insensitive). E.g. enter "TUI" and any OTA booking with channel "TUI Belgium" is automatically counted.
allotment.tourOperatorHint: Important: This name must match the channel/agency field on incoming OTA bookings. E.g. if booking comes via TUI, enter "TUI" — sub-brand names will also match.
